## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between SchoolAI and GrowthX to discuss performance metrics, SEO strategy, and content planning.](https://fathom.video/share/STtubqKUs_S7VKEgREkQu6JWDhMzYAxc?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SchoolAI's overall site impressions are up significantly (+30k), though clicks are down slightly](https://fathom.video/share/STtubqKUs_S7VKEgREkQu6JWDhMzYAxc?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [GrowthX content performance continues to climb, reaching new highs in clicks and impressions](https://fathom.video/share/STtubqKUs_S7VKEgREkQu6JWDhMzYAxc?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [New programmatic SEO strategy proposed, focusing on spaces, power-ups, and platform capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/STtubqKUs_S7VKEgREkQu6JWDhMzYAxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1595.0)
  - [Competitor landscape evolving; Magic School remains primary competitor, with others like Brisk emerging](https://fathom.video/share/STtubqKUs_S7VKEgREkQu6JWDhMzYAxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)

## Topics

### Site Performance Metrics

  - [Overall site impressions up by over 30k, indicating expanded reach and brand awareness](https://fathom.video/share/STtubqKUs_S7VKEgREkQu6JWDhMzYAxc?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [Slight downtick in clicks, likely due to seasonality and specific page performance (e.g., Showcase, Sign Up)](https://fathom.video/share/STtubqKUs_S7VKEgREkQu6JWDhMzYAxc?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [Non-blog pages showing mixed performance; some up (e.g., create a seating chart +26 clicks), others down (e.g., signup page)](https://fathom.video/share/STtubqKUs_S7VKEgREkQu6JWDhMzYAxc?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [Careers page seeing increased traffic, suggesting high interest in working at SchoolAI](https://fathom.video/share/STtubqKUs_S7VKEgREkQu6JWDhMzYAxc?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)

### GrowthX Content Performance

  - [Continuing upward trend in clicks and impressions](https://fathom.video/share/STtubqKUs_S7VKEgREkQu6JWDhMzYAxc?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [Broke previous record for highest week of clicks](https://fathom.video/share/STtubqKUs_S7VKEgREkQu6JWDhMzYAxc?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
  - [Improvement attributed to increased content volume, quality enhancements, and strategic refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/STtubqKUs_S7VKEgREkQu6JWDhMzYAxc?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [Particularly impressive given summer seasonality](https://fathom.video/share/STtubqKUs_S7VKEgREkQu6JWDhMzYAxc?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)

### Competitor Analysis

  - [Magic School remains primary competitor with strong marketing and SEO presence](https://fathom.video/share/STtubqKUs_S7VKEgREkQu6JWDhMzYAxc?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
  - [Brisk (Chrome extension) expanding but behind SchoolAI's upcoming offering](https://fathom.video/share/STtubqKUs_S7VKEgREkQu6JWDhMzYAxc?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
  - [Google Classroom, Canva Education, and Panorama emerging as potential future competitors](https://fathom.video/share/STtubqKUs_S7VKEgREkQu6JWDhMzYAxc?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
  - [SchoolAI differentiating through free Chrome extension and platform capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/STtubqKUs_S7VKEgREkQu6JWDhMzYAxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)

### Programmatic SEO Strategy

  - [Proposed strategy to highlight new platform features and capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/STtubqKUs_S7VKEgREkQu6JWDhMzYAxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1595.0)
  - [Categories include AI lesson plans, AI personalized learning, power-ups, and spaces](https://fathom.video/share/STtubqKUs_S7VKEgREkQu6JWDhMzYAxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)
  - [Focus on creating content around coach-created spaces and power-ups](https://fathom.video/share/STtubqKUs_S7VKEgREkQu6JWDhMzYAxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)
  - [Aim to produce 300 programmatic articles monthly, with flexibility on publishing](https://fathom.video/share/STtubqKUs_S7VKEgREkQu6JWDhMzYAxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

### Content Optimization

  - [Plans to update meta titles and descriptions for top 20 high-impression, low-click posts](https://fathom.video/share/STtubqKUs_S7VKEgREkQu6JWDhMzYAxc?tab=summary&timestamp=2223.0)
  - [Goal to improve click-through rates and overall performance](https://fathom.video/share/STtubqKUs_S7VKEgREkQu6JWDhMzYAxc?tab=summary&timestamp=2230.0)
  - [SchoolAI team open to GrowthX making these updates directly](https://fathom.video/share/STtubqKUs_S7VKEgREkQu6JWDhMzYAxc?tab=summary&timestamp=2281.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Nikki to discuss "versus" blog post strategy with Colton](https://fathom.video/share/STtubqKUs_S7VKEgREkQu6JWDhMzYAxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
  - [Nikki to provide updated list of coach-created spaces for content focus](https://fathom.video/share/STtubqKUs_S7VKEgREkQu6JWDhMzYAxc?tab=summary&timestamp=2182.0)
  - [Megan to share meta title and description suggestions in Slack for approval](https://fathom.video/share/STtubqKUs_S7VKEgREkQu6JWDhMzYAxc?tab=summary&timestamp=2230.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin implementing programmatic SEO strategy, starting with spaces and power-ups content](https://fathom.video/share/STtubqKUs_S7VKEgREkQu6JWDhMzYAxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1595.0)
  - [Explore integration of upcoming research data into content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/STtubqKUs_S7VKEgREkQu6JWDhMzYAxc?tab=summary&timestamp=2075.0)
